head: Remove external lines and components
tail: Remove nuts and bolts joining ring halves at flanges
source_text: Remove external lines and components passing through fireseal mount ring... Remove nuts and bolts joining ring halves at flanges.

head: Remove nuts and bolts joining ring halves at flanges
tail: Remove nuts, washers and bolts that secure ring halves to brackets
source_text: Remove nuts and bolts joining ring halves at flanges. Remove nuts, washers and bolts that secure ring halves to brackets on gas generator case.

head: nuts and bolts
tail: Remove nuts and bolts joining ring halves at flanges
source_text: Remove nuts and bolts joining ring halves at flanges.

head: Remove the power section
tail: Remove the external lines and components passing through the fireseal mount ring
source_text: Remove the power section... Remove the external lines and components passing through the fireseal mount ring

head: Remove the external lines and components passing through the fireseal mount ring
source_text: Remove the external lines and components passing through the fireseal mount ring... Remove the combustion chamber liner

head: Remove the combustion chamber liner
tail: Remove the nuts (9) and bolts (7) joining the fireseal ring halves
source_text: Remove the combustion chamber liner... Remove the nuts (9) and bolts (7) joining the fireseal ring halves

head: Remove the nuts (9) and bolts (7) joining the fireseal ring halves
tail: Remove the nuts (6), washers (5) and bolts (1) securing the ring halves
source_text: Remove the nuts (9) and bolts (7) joining the fireseal ring halves... Remove the nuts (6), washers (5) and bolts (1) securing the ring halves

head: Remove the nuts (6), washers (5) and bolts (1) securing the ring halves
source_text: Remove the nuts (6), washers (5) and bolts (1) securing the ring halves... Remove the vane segment strips (2)

head: Remove the vane segment strips (2)
source_text: Remove the vane segment strips (2) and note the location for reinstallation. Remove the fireseal ring halves (4 and 10).

head: power section
source_text: Remove the power section (Ref. 72-00-00, REMOVAL/INSTALLATION).

head: apply silicone adhesive
source_text: apply silicone adhesive (PWC08-002) to the mating surfaces... Locate the top ring half (4) on the gas generator case

head: Locate the top ring half
source_text: Locate the top ring half (4) on the gas generator case (3)... Locate the vane segment strip (2) inside the gas generator case

head: Locate the vane segment strip
source_text: Locate the vane segment strip (2) inside the gas generator case (3)... Locate the bottom ring half (10) on the gas generator case (3)

head: silicone adhesive
source_text: apply silicone adhesive (PWC08-002) to the mating surfaces

head: Remove air inlet screen
tail: Loosen coupling nut and remove right-hand spray tube
source_text: Remove air inlet screen... Loosen coupling nut and remove right-hand spray tube (1) from tee (3).

head: .SEAL, AIR
source_text: ROTOR BALANCING ASSEMBLY, COMPRESSOR... .SEAL, AIR

head: .BEARING OPTION (IC)
source_text: ROTOR BALANCING ASSEMBLY, COMPRESSOR... .BEARING OPTION (IC)

head: ..BEARING, ROLLER, FLANGED NO.2
source_text: .BEARING OPTION (IC)... ..BEARING, ROLLER, FLANGED NO.2

head: .SHAFT, STUB, COMPRESSOR
source_text: ROTOR BALANCING ASSEMBLY, COMPRESSOR... .SHAFT, STUB, COMPRESSOR

head: .IMPELLER, CENTRIFUGAL
source_text: ROTOR BALANCING ASSEMBLY, COMPRESSOR... .IMPELLER, CENTRIFUGAL

head: ..HOUSING IMPELLER, COMPRESSOR STATOR
source_text: .COMPRESSOR STATOR ASSEMBLY, THIRD-STAGE... ..HOUSING IMPELLER, COMPRESSOR STATOR

head: second-stage stator assembly
source_text: the second-stage stator assembly is retained between flanges in the first- and third-stage stator assemblies.

head: first-stage stator assembly
tail: flange on the front face of the compressor inlet case
source_text: first-stage stator assembly is retained within a flange on the front face of the compressor inlet case.

head: inner race of the No. 2 bearing
source_text: The inner race of the No. 2 bearing is interposed between compressor rotor air seal and the compressor turbine rotor air seal

head: flange of the No. 2 bearing outer race
tail: centerbore of the gas generator case
source_text: The flange of the No. 2 bearing outer race is secured to the centerbore of the gas generator case by four bolts

head: apply silicone adhesive
source_text: apply silicone adhesive (PWC08-002) to the mating surfaces

head: Clean surfaces to be bonded
source_text: Clean surfaces to be bonded with alcohol (PWC11-002) or (PWC11-014).

head: Face (machine) the remaining stub
source_text: Face (machine) the remaining stub to dimension 1.290 ± 1.280 inch using a cutter (PWC32483)

head: Face (machine) the remaining stub
source_text: Face (machine) the remaining stub to dimension 1.290 ± 1.280 inch

head: Tighten the washers
source_text: Tighten the washers (5) and nuts (6) and torque 45 to 55 lb.in.
